MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Gary Scott is present. Represented by Michael Saendz.
Attorney David Brillant appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kelly McKiernan is present.
Attorney Michael J. Kass representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Chaitin, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 606, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of JAN-23-2012 is vacated.
